title: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 18 2025
section_path: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 18 2025
section_path_text: MMI Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 18 2025
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 18/12/2025
The main iron ore contract, I2605, trended strongly, closing at 777.5 CNY/tonne, up 1.63% from the previous trading day.Traders were active in offloading cargoes, whilst steel mills remained cautious, maintaining a wait-and-see approach and procuring strictly on a needs basis. Port spot prices rose by 5-10 CNY/tonne compared to the previous trading day. According to SMM survey data, total inventory across the ten major ports currently stands at 110.26 million tonnes, an increase of 730,000 tonnes period-on-period.
